normalization.notes: Store traditional Mongolian text in NFC and preserve original strings because variation selectors and positional shaping may affect visible forms. Do not compatibility-fold variation sequences or punctuation without reviewer sign-off.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: letters with positional forms, vowel letters, variation sequences, syllable chunks, and vertical punctuation
segmentation.notes: Traditional Mongolian is written top to bottom in columns and relies on contextual shaping. Treat positional forms as rendered variants unless a variation sequence must be explicitly taught.
